'''Jamie Cording''' (born 30 December 1989) is a [[rugby league]] footballer who last played for [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

He previously played for the [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] in the [[Super League]] and [[Featherstone Rovers]], the [[Sheffield Eagles]] and [[Newcastle Thunder|Gateshead Thunder]] in the lower leagues.

In September 2013, Cording signed a two-year contract with [[Featherstone Rovers]].<ref>{{cite web|last=Viller|first=Sam|title=Featherstone sign Jamie Cording|url=http://www.loverugbyleague.com/news_13428-featherstone-sign-jamie-cording.html|publisher=Love Rugby League|accessdate=15 February 2014|date=27 September 2013}}</ref>
